form_convention: penalties_as_draw — a match level after 90 min counts as a DRAW for W-D-L; goals are regulation-time. Locked 2026-06-28.
leakage_rule: per fixture, use the 10 most recent games dated before that fixture pre-kickoff capture; this snapshot covers the Round of 32 only (window rolls forward for later rounds).
